summary: This is a personal development and mindset podcast episode featuring Tyler Smith discussing his health challenges, faith, relationships, homelessness solutions, and life philosophy. No multifamily real estate deal analysis, underwriting, sourcing, or market-specific strategies are covered.
takeaways: Time is finite—calculate remaining days (lifespan minus current age times 365) and write it on a whiteboard to combat procrastination
Don't give time to people who don't value it; relationships require mutual deposits (relationship capital/bank accounts), not one-sided withdrawals
Master your morning to master your day: wake early, meditate/read 10-15 minutes, block time the night before by hour to schedule accomplishments
Success attracts the people you want; struggle attracts the people you need—both matter but serve different purposes
Core purpose from the Seven Mountains (media, family, business, religion, sports, arts, government) is essential to avoid complacency after initial success
Faith and prayer create mental clarity and resilience during crisis; specific daily practice (6am prayer, praise, sermon) can accelerate healing and decision-making
Homelessness has multiple distinct causes (mental illness, addiction, voluntary detachment from society) requiring different solutions—one-size-fit-all approaches waste resources
title: EP 19: Tyler Smith | Justin Brennan
